intro.uz: Walden — Henry David Thoreauning oʻrmonda soddaroq yashab oʻtkazgan tajribasi haqidagi kitob. Asosiy gʻoya: kamroq narsa bilan yashang, koʻp narsaga quvmang, hayotni soddalashtiring. Bu haftaning ikki grammatik mavzusi shu gʻoyaning tili: kamayish qiyoslari (less / fewer / more simply) va umumiy maʼnodagi nol artikl (Nature, life, simplicity — artiklsiz).
intro.en: Walden is Henry David Thoreau's book about his experiment living simply in the woods. The core idea: need less, own fewer things, live more simply. This week's two grammar topics are the language of that idea: comparatives of reduction (less / fewer / more simply) and the zero / generic article (Nature, life, simplicity — with no article).

canDo.uz: Dars oxirida narsalarni kamaytirish haqida toʻgʻri gapira olasiz (fewer things, less stress, live more simply) va mavhum, umumiy tushunchalarni artiklsiz toʻgʻri ayta olasiz (Freedom is important; Nature teaches us).
canDo.en: By the end you can talk correctly about having less (fewer things, less stress, live more simply) and speak about abstract, general ideas with the correct zero article (Freedom is important; Nature teaches us).

grammar.titleUz: Kamayish qiyoslari: less / fewer / more simply / the least
grammar.titleEn: Comparatives of reduction — less / fewer / more simply
grammar.bandLifter: IELTS Part 2 — describe having or needing less over time
grammar.cefrCanDo: B1: I can use less vs fewer correctly with countable and uncountable nouns
grammar.contrastUz: Oʻzbek tilida hammasi bitta soʻz — “kam” yoki “kamroq”: “kamroq pul”, “kamroq narsa”. Ingliz tili esa nimani kamaytirayotganingizga qarab ikkiga ajratadi: sanaladigan koʻplik ot bilan “fewer” (fewer things), sanab boʻlmaydigan ot bilan “less” (less money). Feʼlni soddalashtirsangiz esa ravish keladi: “live more simply”.
grammar.errorFixUz: ❌ less things / less problems. ✅ fewer things / fewer problems. Sanaladigan koʻplik ot bilan “fewer”; “less” faqat sanab boʻlmaydigan ot bilan (less time, less stress). Sinov: otni sanay olsangiz — fewer, aks holda — less.

examples.en: Thoreau owned fewer things than his neighbours.
examples.uz: Thoreau qoʻshnilariga qaraganda kamroq narsaga ega edi.

examples.en: When you simplify your life, you have less stress.
He decided to live more simply.

exercises.hintUz: feʼlni tasvirlaydi → ravish: more simply (more simple emas)

exercises.promptUz: Oʻzingiz haqingizda rost gap ayting (ovoz chiqarib): “I want fewer … , I need less … , and I will live more simply.”
exercises.hintUz: sanaladigan → fewer; sanalmaydigan → less; feʼl → more simply

grammar.titleUz: Artikllar 2: umumiy maʼnoda artiklsiz (nature, life, simplicity)
grammar.bandLifter: IELTS Part 3 — discuss abstract ideas fluently and accurately
grammar.cefrCanDo: B1→B2: I can use the zero article for abstract and uncountable nouns used in a general sense
grammar.contrastUz: Oʻzbek tilida artikl umuman yoʻq — “erkinlik”, “tabiat”, “pul” hamisha yalangʻoch keladi. Ingliz tili esa mavhum yoki umumiy maʼnodagi otni artiklsiz qoldiradi (Freedom is important), aynan aniq narsani esa “the” bilan beradi (the freedom of this country). Umumiy boʻlsa — hech narsa qoʻshmang.
grammar.errorFixUz: ❌ The freedom is important. The nature teaches us. ✅ Freedom is important. Nature teaches us. Mavhum/umumiy tushunchaga artikl qoʻyilmaydi; “the” faqat aniq, konkret narsa uchun (the nature of this forest).

examples.en: Nature teaches us to live simply.
We don't need so much money to be happy.
examples.uz: Baxtli boʻlish uchun bizga koʻp pul kerak emas.

exercises.prompt: ___ teaches us to live simply, wrote Thoreau.
Thoreau believed ___ is more important than money.
We don't need so much ___ to be happy.
exercises.hintUz: sanab boʻlmaydigan ot, umumiy maʼno → artiklsiz: money

exercises.promptUz: Oʻzingiz haqingizda rost gap ayting: “… is important to me.” (masalan Freedom / Simplicity / Silence — mavhum soʻz bilan, artiklsiz)

vocab.defEn: to move forward, especially towards a goal
vocab.example: Advance confidently in the direction of your dreams.

vocab.defEn: to try or attempt to do something
vocab.example: Endeavor to live the life you have imagined.
You will meet with success unexpected in common hours.

vocab.uz: moslashuvchan, erkin, keng (bu yerda: siyosiy emas)
vocab.example: New, more liberal laws will begin to appear around you.

vocab.defEn: to create or set something up
vocab.example: She established a team of builders.

vocab.uz: ...ga yarasha, teng ravishda, bir xil miqdorda
vocab.defEn: in the same amount as; equally with
vocab.example: In proportion as you simplify your life, it becomes easier.

vocab.en: to build castles in the air
vocab.uz: katta orzu qilmoq, xayolan qasr qurmoq
vocab.defEn: to have big dreams or ambitions
vocab.example: Don't be afraid to build castles in the air.

vocab.en: to put the foundations under (a dream)
vocab.uz: orzu ostiga poydevor qoʻymoq (amaliy qadam tashlamoq)
vocab.defEn: to support a dream with real action
vocab.example: Dream big, then put the foundations under it.
Thoreau chose to simplify his life.

vocab.uz: soddaroq yashamoq, kam narsa bilan yashamoq
vocab.defEn: to live with fewer needs and possessions
vocab.example: He learned to live simply in the woods.

warmup.uz: Bu suhbatda ota farzandiga uyni koʻp isitmaslikni, sovuqqa chidashni va bor narsaga shukr qilishni aytadi — u yoshligida faqat bitta pechka bilan yashagan. Walden gʻoyasiga mos: baxt uchun kamroq narsa yetarli. Sizningcha, kamroq qulaylik bilan yashash odamni baxtsiz qiladimi?
warmup.en: In this dialogue a father tells his child not to overheat the house, to bear the cold, and to be grateful — he grew up with just one furnace. It fits the Walden theme: less can be enough for happiness. Do you think living with fewer comforts makes people unhappy?

keyVocab.defEn: to increase the intensity or level of something
to acquire a large bill or debt
a device that controls the temperature
a system that heats a whole building from one source
to become infected with a cold
an enclosed structure that produces strong heat

quiz.q: When were the first mechanical floor cleaners (later vacuum cleaners) invented?
quiz.qUz: Ilk mexanik pol tozalagichlar (keyinchalik changyutgichlar) qachon ixtiro qilingan?
quiz.explanationUz: Toʻgʻri javob: a) 1860-yillar. Neil 1890-yillar dedi va xato qildi — Rob toʻgʻri javob 1860-yillar ekanini aytdi.

vocab.uz: polga tashlab qoʻyilgan kiyimlar uyumi (hazil soʻz)
vocab.defEn: a collection of clothes kept untidily on the floor instead of a wardrobe
untidiness caused by having too many things
to deal with a problem and try to fix it
having an emotional or nostalgic connection
a change in behaviour or attitude

vocab.uz: bor narsa bilan kifoyalanmoq va tuzatib ishlatmoq
vocab.defEn: to use what you have and fix things rather than buying new ones

funEnglish.title: Less stuff, more happiness - Graham Hill

speakingPrompt.en: Imagine you decided to simplify your life like Thoreau. What would you keep and what would you give up? Talk about owning fewer things and needing less, and say what really matters to you (freedom, simplicity, nature).
speakingPrompt.uz: Taxminan 60 soniya gapiring. Bu haftaning ikki grammatikasidan foydalaning: kamayish qiyoslari (fewer things, less stress, live more simply) va umumiy maʼnodagi nol artikl (Freedom is important, Nature teaches us).
